_meta.description: Fabric image dataset — 40 hosted image URLs per material type. All URLs resolve to real images via Unsplash CDN (images.unsplash.com) and Pexels CDN (images.pexels.com). Append ?w=800&q=80 to control size/quality.
_meta.usage: Free for commercial use under Unsplash License and Pexels License. No attribution required.

Lace.description: Delicate openwork fabric with intricate patterns, popular for bridal and formal wear

Ankara.description: Vibrant African wax-print cotton fabric with bold geometric and floral patterns

Silk.description: Lustrous natural protein fiber with smooth texture and elegant drape

George.description: Premium imported fabric popular for traditional attire in South-Eastern Nigeria

Aso-Ebi.description: Coordinated group fabric worn at Nigerian celebrations and ceremonies

Guinea_Brocade.description: Rich woven fabric with raised patterns, popular for traditional West African formal attire

Kampala.description: Tie-dyed fabric from Uganda with unique color splash patterns

Cashmere.description: Ultrafine luxury wool from Cashmere goats, exceptionally soft and warm

Cotton.description: Natural breathable fiber, versatile and comfortable for everyday and traditional wear

Denim.description: Rugged woven cotton twill fabric with distinctive diagonal ribbing

Chiffon.description: Sheer lightweight woven fabric with slight shimmer and delicate drape

Satin.description: Smooth glossy fabric with lustrous face and dull back, popular for formal and bridal wear

Organza.description: Thin, plain weave, sheer fabric with a crisp hand typically made from silk or synthetic fibers

Damask.description: Reversible figured fabric of silk, wool, or synthetic fibers with a pattern formed by weaving

Velvet.description: Woven tufted fabric with a short dense pile, giving a soft feel and rich appearance

Adire.description: Traditional Yoruba tie-dye cloth from Nigeria, made using resist dyeing technique in indigo

Kente.description: Brightly colored Ghanaian ceremonial cloth hand-woven on a horizontal strip loom
